headline: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway Has Held VeriSign, Inc. (VRSN) Since 2012
summary: VeriSign, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSN) is one of the 10 Best Long-Term Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett. VeriSign, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSN) is an internet company that enables domain name registry and provides other services. Its shares are down by 11.5% over the past year and are up by 6.3% year-to-date.
